name: Expand
preserved_meaning: expression value for all x in the domain

name: Factor
preserved_meaning: expression value and zeros when domain is appropriate

name: Add to both sides
preserved_meaning: solution set under standard equality operations
risk_note: usually safe in standard algebraic systems

name: Divide by expression
preserved_meaning: conditional implication only if divided expression nonzero
risk_note: can lose solutions when divisor may be zero

name: Square both sides
preserved_meaning: truth of original implies transformed equation
